{{Infobox character
| name = Sopharanatoth
| aliases = Sophara
| appears_in = Cradle
| titles = Underlord, sacred beast, leader of the gold dragon team, chosen of Seshethkunaaz
| abilities = soulfire, Path of the Flowing Flame, Flowing Flame madra, floating disc, ghostwater, tide of golden flame, water and fire aura, Quickriver technique, Riverflame Dance technique
| affiliations = gold bloodline, gold dragon team, gold dragons
| introduced = cradle-05-ghostwater
}}

''See also: [[Sopharanatoth Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Sopharanatoth, also known as Sophara, is a powerful [[dragon]] belonging to the gold bloodline. As the leader of a team of [[Truegold]] [[dragons]], she is recognized as one of the top contenders in her competition. Physically, she possesses a mostly human appearance characterized by golden eyes, patches of scales on her cheeks and hands, claw-like nails, and a thin golden tail; however, her [[soulfire]] distinguishes her from other Truegolds. She is the chosen of the [[Dragon King]] and has served as an [[Underlord]], once overseeing the entrance to [[Ghostwater]]. Sophara is noted for her immense combat prowess, utilizing golden madra, [[soulfire]], and specialized tools like a floating disc that grants her immunity to certain techniques. She is also capable of utilizing [[sacred arts]] at an advanced level, though attempting to push her advancement toward the [[Lord realm]] caused critical instability in her spirit. Her personal belongings include a [[void key]] that functions as a specialized home and storage space, which has been used to house beneficial treasures and even the [[Remnant]] of her sister, [[Ekeri]].}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|Sopharanatoth is a [[dragon]] belonging to the gold bloodline. Her appearance is notably unique, possessing a face that remains almost entirely human aside from her eyes and patches of scales upon her cheeks. She is further distinguished from other gold [[dragons]] by the presence of her [[soulfire]]. Additionally, she is known for her shrieking laughter.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Sopharanatoth]] is a [[dragon]] of the gold bloodline.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c10">''Ghostwater'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|Sophara's [[soulfire]] sets her apart from other gold [[dragons]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|Sophara's face is almost entirely human except for her eyes and patches of scales on her cheeks.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Sopharanatoth]] is a [[dragon]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c17">''Ghostwater'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Sopharanatoth]] has shrieking laughter.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c17" />}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Sopharanatoth is a sacred gold [[dragon]] and a chosen of [[Seshethkunaaz]] who follows the [[Path of the Flowing Flame]]. As an [[Underlord]] and leader of her gold dragon team, she engaged in combat with [[Yerin]] and [[Mercy]] following the death of her younger sister. During the tenth test, she secured first place in the tournament, showcasing a spirit so powerful that [[Lindon]] suspected she might be an [[Overlord]]. While competing, the dragon-girl utilized a floating disc to resist [[Striker techniques]] and unleashed tides of golden flame, though her supply of ghostwater was limited to a single drop. Throughout the events, she maintained a human form marked by golden scales on her cheeks and hands before eventually falling to her knees.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Sopharanatoth]] is a gold [[dragon]] with the power of an [[Underlord]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c8">''Uncrowned'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Sopharanatoth]] follows the [[Path of the Flowing Flame]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Sopharanatoth]] is a sacred beast.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Sophara has scales.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Sophara has an [[aura]]-born voice.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Sophara has wings.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Sopharanatoth]] is a strong fighter who was fought by [[Yerin]] and [[Mercy]] after her younger sister's death in [[Ghostwater]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c9">''Uncrowned'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Sopharanatoth]] is the leader of the gold dragon team.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c10">''Uncrowned'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Sopharanatoth]]'s human form has patches of gold scales on her cheeks and the backs of her hands.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The gold-scaled [[Sopharanatoth]] burns through black soldiers and their base.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c11">''Uncrowned'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Sophara used [[Flowing Flame madra]] on the box.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Sopharanatoth]] was first place overall in the tenth test.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c12">''Uncrowned'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Sophara holds first place in the tournament.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Sophara is a gold [[dragon]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Sophara's name is [[Sopharanatoth]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Sophara is also known as [[Sopharanatoth]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Sophara is an opponent whose performance was recorded on a dream tablet.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Sophara's spirit is strong enough that [[Lindon]] suspected she might be an [[Overlord]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Sophara is a competitor [[Lindon]] intends to ambush.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c14">''Uncrowned'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Sophara is frightening to [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Sophara is running.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Sophara is a dragon-girl with golden scales and a tail.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Sophara possesses a floating disc that makes her nearly immune to [[Striker techniques]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c15">''Uncrowned'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Sophara is physically stronger than everyone except [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Sophara utilizes ghostwater.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Sophara's ghostwater supply is limited to a single drop.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Sophara can unleash a tide of golden flame.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Sophara has golden eyes.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Sophara was carrying two crowns before being passed.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Sopharanatoth]] is of the line of gold [[dragons]] and a chosen of [[Seshethkunaaz]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c18">''Uncrowned'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Sophara holds a bottled elixir.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c19">''Uncrowned'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon]] has been running mental battles against Sophara.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Sophara fell to her knees.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c21">''Uncrowned'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Sopharanatoth is a [[dragon]] of the gold [[dragons]] and one of the two most favored competitors in a tournament prepared by her kind. During her preparation, she attempted advancement while coiled within eight [[natural treasures]], an effort that resulted in fear and pain. Having utilized various elixirs and a [[Madra Engine]] to process blood and life essence, she successfully advanced to the rank of [[Overlord]]. As a combatant in the tournament finals, she utilized an [[Archlord weapon]] and various techniques to defeat opponents such as [[Akura Malice]]’s daughter, [[Brother Aekin]], and [[Yerin]]. Despite her prowess, her spirit eventually began unraveling, leading to a confrontation where she moved from the [[arena]] to an assassination attempt against [[Mercy]] and [[Lindon]].}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Sophara is a fighter in the competition.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c2">''Wintersteel'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Sopharanatoth]] is one of the two most favored to win the competition.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Sophara is attempting advancement while coiled in a circle of eight [[natural treasures]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c4">''Wintersteel'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Sophara experienced pain and fear following a failed advancement attempt.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Sophara's spirit channels are visualized as a network of bright orange lines.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Sophara has a snout and a head larger than the [[Herald]]'s entire body in her current form.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Mercy]] mentions a potential match against Sophara.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c5">''Wintersteel'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Sophara is a competitor in the tournament prepared by the gold [[dragons]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Sophara has been given many enhancements for the tournament.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Sophara's match settled the roster of the eight [[Uncrowned]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c7">''Wintersteel'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Sophara's signature would be gold.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Sophara is a character [[Yerin]] wants to beat in a month.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c8">''Wintersteel'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Mercy]] intends to defeat Sophara herself.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Fury]] personally killed Sophara's great-aunt.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c16">''Wintersteel'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Sophara is a [[dragon]] who uses water and fire aura.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Sophara has used the [[Gate of Heaven elixir]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Sophara uses a mental power elixir.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Sophara uses a [[Madra Engine]] that processes blood and life essence into [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Sophara uses the [[Quickriver]] technique in the form of a saber.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Sophara uses [[Forged madra]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Sophara uses the [[Riverflame Dance]] technique.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Sophara has an [[Overlord]]-level body.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Sophara uses a whip called [[Quickriver]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Sophara uses the [[Azure Moon Reigns]] technique.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Sophara uses the [[Crimson Sun Rises]] technique.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Sophara uses the [[Striker technique]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Sophara uses the [[Enforced]] whip technique.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Sophara uses the [[Nightworm Venom]] technique.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Sophara uses the [[Strings of Shadow]] technique.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Sopharanatoth]] defeated [[Akura Malice]]’s daughter.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c17">''Wintersteel'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Sophara has advanced to [[Overlord]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] loses to an illusory version of Sophara created by [[Dross]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c18">''Wintersteel'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|There is a fight against Sophara that [[Malice]] may not be pleased about.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Sophara is a person whom others are trying to express confidence in.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Sophara is an [[Overlord]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c20">''Wintersteel'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Sophara's spiritual channels are being worn out by the [[Symbiote Veins]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Sophara is an opponent in the finals.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c21">''Wintersteel'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Sophara is [[Malice]]'s daughter.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c22">''Wintersteel'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Sophara obliterated [[Brother Aekin]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c23">''Wintersteel'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Sophara used her [[Enforcer technique]] and her [[dragon]]'s breath to defeat [[Brother Aekin]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Sophara had a match against [[Mercy]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c24">''Wintersteel'', chapter 24</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] is going into battle against Sophara.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c25">''Wintersteel'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Sophara's spirit was unraveling.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c25" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Sophara burns ghostwater.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c25" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Sophara's fighting style was analyzed by [[Dross]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c25" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Sophara is a character who uses an [[Archlord weapon]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c25" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Sophara defeated [[Yerin]] by decapitating her.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c25" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Sophara possesses the [[Dragon King]]’s [[Totem]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c26">''Wintersteel'', chapter 26</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Sophara is a character who wielded the [[Endless Sword]] to protect an unconscious [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c26" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Sophara is [[Sopharanatoth]] of the gold [[dragons]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c26" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Sophara uses [[Quickriver]] in the form of a short, broad [[sword]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c26" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Sophara possesses an [[Imperial Aegis]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c26" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Sophara can turn to white light and disperse.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c26" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Sophara's head had [[gold light]] condensing over it.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c26" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Sophara is a [[sacred artist]] whose spirit is finished.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27">''Wintersteel'', chapter 27</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Sophara used an [[Enforcer technique]], a shield, and a liquid whip.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Sophara clashed with [[Mercy]] on a narrow ridge of stone.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Sophara intercepted [[Lindon]] with her tail.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Sophara was fighting [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c28">''Wintersteel'', chapter 28</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Sophara used [[Quickriver]] to pour [[madra]] into a [[binding]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c28" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Sophara went from the [[arena]] to an assassination attempt on [[Mercy]] and [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c28" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] stood over a hopeless Sophara.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c28" />}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Sophara fought outside [[Sky's Edge]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c2">''Bloodline'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Sophara possesses a [[void key]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c18">''Bloodline'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Sophara had a [[void key]] and a [[Heaven’s Torch]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c19">''Bloodline'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Dawn Sky Palace]] was stolen from Sophara.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c7">''Reaper'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The gold [[dragons]] pumped [[Sopharanatoth]] as full as they dared, causing critical instability in her spirit.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c3">''Waybound'', chapter 3</ref>}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Sophara's body was still warm outside.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Lindon]] was supposed to fight Sophara.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c14">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|You are already done," her aura-born voice said.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c8" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|"Yerin and I fought her after you killed her younger sister in Ghostwater."<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c9" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|"What happened to the other crown?" Sophara had been carrying two.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c15" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|“But if they match me against Sophara, you’ll get to see every card I have to play.”<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c5" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Gold dragons]]
[[Category:Sacred artists]]
[[Category:Viewpoint characters]]
